# Pucar · ON Court — design system

Pucar's design system for the ON Court product (Indian courts — Section 138, CNR, hearings; Kerala). Built on shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4, Radix-anchored tokens, machine-verified WCAG 2.2 AA in light and dark (the build fails below the floor).

## Read first (the design law + the craft)
- **design-guidelines.md** — the LAW: sentence case only; brand teal rationed to primary/active/focus; status colours mean status; **three treatments per status hue** (solid = the one strong action · opaque tint pair = chips/callouts · ink = text/icons on neutral — solids are never text, alpha status fills are banned); the **monotone grey ladder** (muted 2 → sunken 2½ → accent 3 hover → accent-strong 4 engaged → track 5 — interaction moves one step down); **control metrics** (fields default 40px; radius by role: container xl · control lg · inset md/sm · chip full; container padding 24); AA floor; never colour alone.
- **screen-craft.md** — the CRAFT: spacing ladder (+ micro-spacing 2/6/10 inside controls only), page scaffolds (form/list/detail/dashboard/empty), hierarchy & squint test, UX patterns (dialog vs sheet vs page, feedback, filtering, disclosure), the 5 screen states, citizen vs staff density, the mandatory review pass. Generating ANY screen? Follow both.
- **component-usage.md** — when and how to use each of the 48 components: job, use-when, don't-use (with the "use X instead" pointer), variant meanings, and the four decision trees (actions, feedback, containers/overlays, navigation). Every component file carries a distilled top-comment of its entry.
- **DECISIONS.md** — every ruling with trigger + rationale. Check before "fixing" anything deliberate.

## Rules of thumb
Sentence case. Teal rationed. Status = meaning (chips/inks), charts = categorical. One chip: Badge. AA machine-verified. Generous spacing, ladder-only gaps. Never colour alone (pair with icon/arrow/label). Selection = brand tint; hover = grey; disabled = washed. Live gallery at `/`, measured tokens at `/foundations`.

## Foundations — tokens (source of truth: lib/tokens/tokens.ts → `pnpm tokens`)
- Surfaces: background · foreground · card · card-foreground · popover · popover-foreground · surface · surface-raised
- Brand & neutrals: primary · secondary · secondary-foreground · muted · muted-foreground · accent · accent-foreground · accent-strong · brand-muted · brand-muted-foreground · sidebar · sidebar-foreground · sidebar-primary · sidebar-accent · sidebar-accent-foreground · sidebar-border · sidebar-ring
- Status — solids: destructive · success · info · warning · warning-foreground
- Status — tints: success-muted · success-muted-foreground · warning-muted · warning-muted-foreground · info-muted · info-muted-foreground · destructive-muted · destructive-muted-foreground
- Status — inks (text/icons on neutral): success-ink · warning-ink · info-ink · destructive-ink
- Structure: track · prefilled · border · input · ring · brand-accent (non-text) · surface-sunken
- Charts (categorical, never status): chart-1 … chart-5
- Type scale: text-display · text-display-s · text-title-l · text-title · text-title-s · text-body · text-body-compact · text-caption
- Elevation: shadow-raised · shadow-overlay · shadow-modal (per-theme values) · radius knob 0.625rem (rounded-sm/md/lg/xl/full by ROLE)
- Solid foregrounds flip white→ink in dark: primary-foreground · destructive-foreground · success-foreground · info-foreground · sidebar-primary-foreground

## Components (components/ui/ — 48 primitives, all registry-installable)
accordion · alert · alert-dialog · avatar · badge · breadcrumb · button · button-group · calendar · card · chart · checkbox · collapsible · command · description-list · dialog · document-slot · drawer · dropdown-menu · empty · field · hover-card · input · input-group · input-otp · label · menubar · navigation-menu · pagination · popover · progress · radio-group · scroll-area · select · separator · sheet · sidebar · skeleton · slider · sonner · spinner · switch · table · tabs · textarea · toggle · toggle-group · tooltip

## Patterns & blocks
- **use-mobile** (hook) —
- **site-shell** (component) — Pucar app frame — sidebar (grouped nav + user block) + top bar. Blocks (case-dashboard, new-case-form) are designed to render inside this shell — add it first and wrap your pages with it (plus the theme provider).
- **case-dashboard** (block) — ON Court dashboard — stat cards, filings chart, share-of-docket, today's hearings. Expects to render inside site-shell.
- **new-case-form** (block) — ON Court intake — sectioned multi-field complaint form. Expects to render inside site-shell.

## Install (self-hosted shadcn registry)
- Theme + utility mappings: `npx shadcn add https://pucar-ui.vercel.app/r/pucar-theme.json`
- Any component, Pucar-themed (deps auto-resolve here): `npx shadcn add https://pucar-ui.vercel.app/r/<name>.json`
- The law as files: `npx shadcn add https://pucar-ui.vercel.app/r/design-rules.json`
- Live gallery: https://pucar-ui.vercel.app/ · measured token lab: https://pucar-ui.vercel.app/foundations
